case_title: JOHN DOUGLAS CLINE VS. MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY CLINE, JOHN DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE (DAN MILLER) FOUNDER . ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOHN DOUGLAS CLINE. DEFENDANT MULBUERRY'S GARMENT CARE IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
